name: Presidents Tower Defense
short_description: Defend the Oval Office from an endless alien invasion by harnessing the abilities of your favorite (or least favorite) U.S. Presidents.
detailed_description:
Aliens have invaded, and its up to your team of presidents to stop them from reaching the nuclear codes in the Oval Office!

Choose from a roster of 9 U.S. Presidents, each having their own unique weapons, abilities, and playstyles.

Kill aliens, collect loot, upgrade your stats, place turrets & traps, and defeat bosses. Perhaps you can even figure out how to end the invasion?

Features:
  • Tower Defense & Horde Survival PvE
  • 9 unique character kits
  • Over two dozen unique enemies
  • Upgradeable character stats
  • Boss battles
